required_identity_anchors.description: Mutated replay floors must retain lineage to the original known_layout_seed.
Entry and exit/gate logic must remain valid after mutation.
At least one traversable route from entry to objective must remain possible.
At least one major recognizable landmark or structural motif must remain.
Mutation may alter tone but must not replace the floor's core biome/theme identity.
Mutation severity must not create impossible or non-playable floor states.
Hidden marks and easter eggs must remain discoverable through observation, not random guessing.
